# gigahost_account (Data Source)

Retrieves the authenticated Gigahost account profile.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up the authenticated Gigahost account profile.
data "gigahost_account" "current" {}

output "account_name" {
  value = data.gigahost_account.current.cust_name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `cust_address` (String) Postal address.
- `cust_billing_email` (String) Billing email.
- `cust_city` (String) City.
- `cust_company_no` (String) Organization/company number.
- `cust_country` (String) Country.
- `cust_email` (String) Primary contact email.
- `cust_id` (String) Customer id.
- `cust_name` (String) Customer (company or person) name.
- `cust_phone` (String) Phone number.
- `cust_zipcode` (String) Postal/ZIP code.
